---
name: "📌 Pull Request"
about: Propose changes to the codebase
title: "[PR] Brief description of changes"
---

## ✏️ Description

Clearly describe the purpose of this pull request and the changes it introduces.

## 📋 Related Issues

List any related issues or epics this PR addresses:
- Closes #XX
- Partially addresses #YY
- Related to E-ZZ

## 🛠️ Changes Made

Detail the technical modifications:
- Added `...`
- Modified `...` to fix `...`
- Refactored `...` for better `...`

## 🧪 Testing

Explain how you verified your changes:
- [ ] Unit tests added/modified (location: `tests/...`)
- [ ] BDD scenarios executed (features: `features/...`)
- [ ] Manual testing performed (steps: `...`)

## 📸 CLI/TUI Screenshots (if applicable)

Attach screenshots demonstrating the changes in action.

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (`ruff check` passed)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation if needed
- [ ] I have added/updated tests to cover my changes
- [ ] All CI checks are passing (lint, tests, coverage ≥80%)

## 📄 Additional Notes

Add any other context about the PR here, including:
- Trade-offs considered
- Temporary workarounds
- Future TODOs
